name: DNA Reverse Complement
description: Return the reverse complement of a DNA or RNA sequence. Supports standard bases and IUPAC ambiguity codes (R, Y, S, W, K, M, N).

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: DNA or RNA sequence. Accepts a resource name (e.g. 'pBR322'), a raw sequence string (e.g. 'ATGCGATCG'), a FASTA-formatted string, or a GenBank-formatted string. The framework resolves resource names and file formats automatically before passing the clean sequence to this function.

outputs.description: Reverse complement of the input sequence, returned as an uppercase string of the same length.
